title: Why Lebanon Was Excluded From Ceasefire Plan
summary_full: Created by the IRGC during the Lebanese Civil War, the Shiite Muslim movement gained its moniker - 'the Resistance' - by fighting Israeli troops occupying southern Lebanon till 2000.
